title: NoCollisions
body:
### 🧍 No Collisions Datapack

This lightweight datapack completely disables player-to-player collisions in Minecraft, allowing players to move freely through each other. No collisions looks like this. ![No collision](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4e0e7f4229653f98a5e3ee1acc1d0fc99e6ad25_0.webp)

### ✨ Features

- Removes all collision between players — no more getting pushed or stuck in tight spaces.
- Perfect for multiplayer servers, minigames, and roleplay worlds where movement freedom matters.
- Works seamlessly with other datapacks and vanilla gameplay — no mods required.
- Designed for performance and simplicity, with zero setup needed.

### 💡 Why Use It?

If you’ve ever been frustrated by players bumping into each other during builds, PvE combat, or spawn gatherings, this datapack provides a smooth, frustration-free experience.

Simply drop it into your world’s datapacks folder, reload, and enjoy collision-free gameplay!

### ⚙️ Installation Guide
1. Download any version from the versions tab
2. Press WIN + R and type %appdata%
3. Go to .minecraft/saves/Your World/datapacks/
4. Put the datapack in the datapacks folder
5. Enable the datapack by /datapack enable "file/NoCollisions"
6. Done! Player collisions are now disabled.
